title: Ubiquiti Phone Touch Max, UTP-TouchMax
description: Ubiquiti Phone Touch Max is the new generation of VOIP desktop phones. The phone is operated using a 7" display with a resolution of 1280 x 800 HD , which supports Multi-touch technology. There are 2 gigabit LAN ports available for connection. On the side of the phone, there is a button for quickly muting the microphone. The phone can be powered via PoE+ or USB-C with a maximum power consumption of 5 W 7" touch display 5MP video camera Mute button Powered via USB-C and PoE+
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g Image Screen size ["] 7 Camera resolution 5MP Display resolution 1280 x 800 Connectors and Interfaces Touchscreen Yes LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Other features 3,5 jack connector, Bluetooth
